problem: Desktop powers on but shows no display.
visual_clue: Monitor power light is orange and the desktop fans spin.
learner_action: Check monitor input, video cable, RAM seating, and graphics connection.
success_condition: Learner identifies one likely cause and documents the first safe check.

problem: Laptop connects to Wi-Fi but cannot load websites.
visual_clue: Wi-Fi icon says connected but the browser times out.
learner_action: Check IP address, gateway, DNS, and router status.
success_condition: Learner explains why Wi-Fi connection and internet access are different.

problem: A Windows VM boots slowly and has low disk space.
visual_clue: Storage bar is red and startup takes more than two minutes.
learner_action: Check startup apps, disk usage, updates, and temporary files.
success_condition: Learner documents one safe cleanup action and one follow-up recommendation.

problem: A user reports a suspicious sign-in email.
visual_clue: The message asks the user to verify the account through an unfamiliar link.
learner_action: Identify phishing signs, advise password reset from a trusted page, and enable MFA.
success_condition: Learner lists three phishing indicators without clicking the link.

visual_clue: The same error appears each time the app opens.
learner_action: Check restart, updates, event logs, reinstall path, and user profile behavior.
success_condition: Learner records the symptom, attempted checks, and next escalation step.

problem: A user is upset because a ticket was closed without notes.
visual_clue: Ticket status says Done but the resolution field is blank.
learner_action: Write clear ticket notes, confirm the user impact, and define next communication.
success_condition: Learner writes a complete resolution note in plain language.
